case_title: DAVID KWUN TSE VS. AI YAN ZHANG

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TSE, DAVID KWUN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT ZHANG, AI YAN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,315.29 FILED BY TSE, DAVID KWUN AS TO DEFENDANT ZHANG, AI YAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-05-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE WAIVED) SERVED NOV-18-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ZHANG, AI YAN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-05-2011 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-05-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-05-2011 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER PARKMAN JOE PRESENT ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TSE, DAVID KWUN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ZHANG, AI YAN PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM FOR REIMBURSEMENT FOR FUNDS WIRED TO CHINA IS BARRED BY THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED WAS INSUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH THE REMAINING PORTIONS OF HIS CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
